title: Law Uses Gamma Knife
description: Pages 4–8 focus on law uses gamma knife, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Unknown person #1, Trebol, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as law uses his hidden trump card against Doflamingo, but the tyrant's power keeps the final battle from ending.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: He's in for a rude awakening, isn't he, law...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: What is the identity of the "Most evil truth" that assaults law!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: When he sees your lifeless corpse...

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Sticky Launcher!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A few minutes ago Royal Palace

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Behehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehe! He's still alive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Cough

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Hey, hey~ Law~ Don't you think it's time for you to throw in the towel already?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You should just...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Pumposexes the number of

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Take a nap, law...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're in way over your head against just me... what the hell made you think you could take us both on at once?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It'll take straw hat some time to get up here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If he had the stomach to just end the life of a former friend,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: your ass might have been saved, but... He's soft, right down to the very core.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You were born in a white hell....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And from your early childhood on, your future was shredded in darkness...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Then you met Corazon and your time left on this earth lengthened...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yet you became his ghost...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: despising me, you lived those years granted to you only for revenge...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A truly meaningless 13 years it has been.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You have my sympathy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You will meet your maker today, about that you can be certain.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: An UN- avoidable, wretched death.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Yet if you are to meet your end...Why not make it at least a little meaningful?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Perform the ope-ope fruit's ultimate technique, "Immortality surgery", on me and then leave this world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: In exchange for that, I shall...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Grant your wishes, whatever they may be!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: anything? If you really mean that, then that's quite the offer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: It'll work to both of our benefits...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: *Cough* I'm in.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Behehe! You sure know a good thing when it snacks you right in the face!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: So Dofy's gonna get endless life, eh!?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Here's what I want. Right now, this moment... Bring Corazon back to life.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: And go lick the asshole of every last citizen of this poor country.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're the one that's totally in over your head here, Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The straw hat crew have left nothing in their wake but sheer miracles.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You'll never beat them. You'll never get Caesar back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Your future is the one Tha-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: UUG GHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Those letters on your back...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: "Corazon."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: What are they trying to imply?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: The name of your "Heart Pirates" too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Just what are you trying to imply!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: you... who shall never sit on the heart seat!

summary: Law Uses Gamma Knife advances the Dressrosa story through Doflamingo, Unknown person #1, Trebol, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
